name: ChkCreate_PayloadGapsObservationRx, ChkStart_PayloadGapsObservationRx
title: ChkCreate_PayloadGapsObservationRx, ChkStart_PayloadGapsObservationRx
syntax: dword ChkCreate_PayloadGapsObservationRx(Node aNode, long defaultBitValue, char [] aCallback);
dword ChkStart_PayloadGapsObservationRx(Node aNode, long defaultBitValue, char [] aCallback);
description: Checks the payload gaps and the DLC of all Rx messages of a node.
The check condition is violated if the payload gaps do not match the specified default bit value or the DLC does not match the specified DLC of the database.

parameters.name: defaultBitValue
parameters.description: Default bit value the payload gaps must have.

parameters.name: aCallback
parameters.description: This parameter must be specified in simulation nodes; it is optional in test modules.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
